name: upload_file
description: Upload a file to OneDrive at a specified path. For files up to 4 MB, use simple upload by putting the file content directly in the request body. For larger files, create an upload session instead.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The full path where the file should be stored in OneDrive, relative to the root (e.g., 'Documents/report.pdf'). This is part of the URL path.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: The MIME type of the file being uploaded.

parameters.name: @microsoft.graph.conflictBehavior
parameters.description: Conflict resolution strategy: 'rename', 'replace', or 'fail'. Set as a query parameter.
